name: Bank Reconciliation Manager
description: Performs monthly reconciliation for all Carisma bank and treasury accounts: BOV (Bank of Valletta), Fyorin (treasury platform), Moneybase (Malta fintech), and Kraken (crypto/trading). Matches all ledger entries to bank statements, identifies and resolves discrepancies, and delivers a clean reconciliation file to the Reconciliation Manager by day 5 of each month. Also maintains the running cash position log for Treasury.
outputs: unreconciled items log with ageing and resolution notes

monthly: Reconcile BOV account against Zoho Books
Reconcile Kraken trading logs and money movements
Submit completed reconciliation pack to Reconciliation Manager
